title: Kanimangalam Sastha Temple
tagline: Kanimangalam Sastha Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kanimangalam Sastha Temple is Hindu temple situated in Kanimangalam, Thrissur City of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Kanimangalam Sastha Temple is Hindu temple situated in Kanimangalam, Thrissur City of Kerala, India. Lord Shasta is the main deity of the temple. Kanimangalam Sastha is the main participant of the famous Thrissur Pooram. Kanimangalam Sastha is the first Pooram entering the Vadakkunnathan Temple.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chiyyaram
topPlaces.description: Chiyyaram is a village that lies on the outskirts of Thrissur, Kerala, South India. The Vijayamatha Church stands as a symbol of unity among the natives which enabled its planning, implementation, and construction.

topPlaces.name: Palissery
topPlaces.description: Palissery is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Sree Maheswara Temple
topPlaces.description: Sree Maheswara Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Koorkenchery in Thrissur city of Kerala state. The main idol in this temple is Shiva and was consecrated by Narayana Guru in M. E. 1092.

topPlaces.name: Kuriachira
topPlaces.description: Kuriachira is a municipal ward in Thrissur, Kerala. It is located within 2 km south of Swaraj Round.

topPlaces.name: Saint Antony's Syro-Malabar Church, Ollur
topPlaces.description: The St. Antony's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church is located at Ollur, Thrissur city in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kanimangalam
topPlaces.description: Kanimangalam is a suburb of Thrissur in the Thrissur district of the state of Kerala in south India. It is about 4 km away from Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Palakkal
topPlaces.description: Palakkal is a ward of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala in south India. It is a suburb located about 6 km from Thrissur City.

topPlaces.name: Vadookara
topPlaces.description: Vadookara (വടൂക്കര) is a residential area in southwest Thrissur, Kerala state, India. It is closer to the city starting from Koorkenchery and extending towards Nedupuzha and Aranattukara.Vadookara is the 40th ward of Thrissur Corporation.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanimangalam Sastha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanimangalam Sastha Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanimangalam Sastha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (42 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanimangalam Sastha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanimangalam Sastha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanimangalam Sastha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kanimangalam Sastha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanimangalam Sastha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chiyyaram, Palissery, Sree Maheswara Temple, Kuriachira, Saint Antony's Syro-Malabar Church, Ollur.
